{{Quote|We'll take him to Tarkin Prison on Ruul for a nice long stay. Perhaps that will adjust his attitude.|[[Malcor Brashin]], speaking of [[Beri Tulon]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
The '''Tarkin Detention Facility''', also called simply '''Tarkin Prison''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] used to hold political prisoners. [[Beri Tulon]] was scheduled to be imprisoned there, but [[Brenn Tantor]] freed him in a [[Mission to Ruul (Galactic Civil War)|commando raid]] as he was being marched to the facility.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
